description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image and token configuration provided by the .ci-image-ops, .delivery-metrics-ops and .common-ci-tokens templates. Define a build stage with a job named build:delivery-metrics that runs the shell commands './scripts/delivery-metrics.sh build' followed by './scripts/delivery-metrics.sh release'. Add a metrics stage with a job called metrics that inherits the .common-job-setup and .mimir-query-auth templates, runs the command 'bundle exec rake metrics', is tagged with the runner tag 'release', and is configured to always run (when: always) but allow failure when the environment variables MIMIR_URL, PUSHGATEWAY_URL and PUSH_METRICS are set.
